creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
I addressed most of the major issues with sbcl update here:
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&revision=432557

Even with sbcl bootstrap, the background TTY signals are getting emitted, so it seems specific to sbcl 1.13 build itself, not CCL.

Since synth has been modified to handle it, and since there's apparently no issue on poudriere, let's close the report.  I don't know what else can be done about it.
